http.400: Bad Request: The server could not understand the request due to invalid syntax.
http.401: Unauthorized: Access is denied due to invalid credentials.
http.403: Forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
http.404: Not Found: The requested resource could not be found.
http.429: Too Many Requests: You have exceeded the rate limit.
http.500: Internal Server Error: The server encountered an unexpected condition.

validation.revoked: This license has been permanently revoked by an administrator.
validation.ip_mismatch: This license is bound to another IP address. Access denied.
validation.expired: Your active plan has expired. Please renew your subscription.

welcome.subject: Welcome to InnerStudios!
welcome.body:
Hi {name},

Welcome to InnerStudios! We're excited to have you on board.
